evidence.claim: The user sees a competency breakdown with weak competency flags and study tips.
evidence.fact: The competency breakdown provides a study tip for each flagged weak competency.
evidence.user_story_span: Then I see a competency breakdown with weak competency flags and study tips
evidence.fact_span: The competency breakdown provides a study tip for each flagged weak competency.

evidence.claim: Study tips are generated based on flagged weaknesses.
evidence.fact: The competency breakdown provides a study tip for each flagged weak competency.
evidence.user_story_span: Study tips are generated based on flagged weaknesses.
evidence.fact_span: The competency breakdown provides a study tip for each flagged weak competency.

evidence.claim: The system analyzes exam results immediately after submission.
evidence.fact: Right after the test finishes, learners receive a per-competency evaluation with weaknesses emphasized and accompanied by recommended study actions.
evidence.user_story_span: The system analyzes exam results immediately after submission.
evidence.fact_span: Right after the test finishes, learners receive a per-competency evaluation with weaknesses emphasized and accompanied by recommended study actions.
